src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/co.general_idea: Removed the unused import for @Autowired since constructor injection is used via @RequiredArgsConstructor.
Changed the class modifier from public to package-private to restrict access scope.
src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/co.human_impl:
-public class JwtAuthenticationFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {
+class JwtAuthenticationFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {

src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/co.general_idea: Renamed method parameters to shorter names (req, res, chain) for brevity.
src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/co.human_impl:
-protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain filterChain)
+protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse res, FilterChain chain)

src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/co.general_idea: Reordered the throws clause to list IOException before ServletException, likely following a specific coding standard.
Updated all internal references to use the new shortened parameter names.
Removed the explicit @Configuration annotation because @EnableWebSecurity implies it, simplifying the class header.
Replaced field injection with constructor injection for UserDetailsService to align with modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/co.human_impl: Changed '@Resource private UserDetailsService' to 'private final UserDetailsService' and moved it to constructor parameters.

src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/co.general_idea: Reordered class fields to group final constructor-injected fields together for better readability.

src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/mo.general_idea: Set MapStruct unmappedSourcePolicy to IGNORE to suppress warnings for unmapped source properties.
Set ignoreByDefault to true on the entityToDto mapping to explicitly ignore unmapped properties.
Replace specific MapStruct imports with a wildcard import for brevity.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK.
Remove the optional scope from the Lombok dependency, making it a standard compile-time dependency.
Add the Google API Services Gmail client library.
Add the Google OAuth Client Jetty library for authentication support.
Add the Apache Commons CSV library for CSV processing.
Add the PostgreSQL JDBC driver as a runtime dependency.
Upgrade the Maven Compiler Plugin to version 3.12.1 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
Reorder annotation processor paths to place Lombok before MapStruct, ensuring correct processing order.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Removed the instruction to copy the StoredCredential token file into the container image.
